audit_items.proof_trace: Within the function, `entry->names` is deleted on line 73 and never accessed again; `entry` is freed on line 74 as the last operation — no UAF or double-free within the function body. The broader invariant holds because `sweepCache()` (the only runtime caller of this deleter) runs exclusively inside the global `gTimeZoneNamesLock` mutex and only removes entries with `refCount <= 0`; all `refCount` modifications in constructors, destructors, and `clone()` are also guarded by this same mutex, so no live delegate can hold a reference to an entry that sweep removes.
